title: Memory decay uses temporary type extension (prisma generate TODO)
description: src/server/features/memory/decay.ts uses extended MemoryFact type with TODO to remove after prisma generate.
acceptance_criteria: Regenerate Prisma client and remove temporary type extension.

title: Usage tracking is OpenAI-specific
description: src/server/lib/redis/usage.ts uses openai* counters with TODO: not OpenAI specific.
acceptance_criteria: Generalize usage tracking to provider-agnostic fields.

title: Resend digest batch fetch belongs in provider
description: src/app/api/resend/digest/route.ts TODO: refactor batch message fetching into provider if reused.
acceptance_criteria: Move batch fetch into provider or remove TODO.

title: Safe-action instrumentation consolidation TODO
description: src/server/actions/safe-action.ts TODO: move withActionInstrumentation functionality here.
acceptance_criteria: Consolidate action instrumentation or remove TODO.

title: AI get tool: automation resource stub
description: src/server/features/ai/tools/get.ts returns empty data with error 'Automation get not implemented yet'.
acceptance_criteria: Implement automation get resource or remove from tool schema.

title: AI clean: no support for specific labels
description: src/server/features/clean/ai/ai-clean.ts TODO: allow specific labels; schema only returns archive boolean.
acceptance_criteria: Add label output support and optional label list input.

title: Drive filing tool bypasses user filing settings
description: src/server/features/ai/tools/create.ts forces filingEnabled=true and injects a default filingPrompt, bypassing user settings and intent.
acceptance_criteria: Respect user filing settings and prompts; only proceed when enabled (or record explicit approval).
notes: Fixed: drive filing tool now respects filingEnabled and filingPrompt.

title: Cron endpoints lack QStash signature verification
description: Cron endpoints only check CRON_SECRET; TODO comment notes QStash signature verification should be used. Affected: src/app/api/scheduled-actions/execute/route.ts and src/app/api/google/watch/renew/route.ts (similar pattern in calendar/drive watch renew routes).
acceptance_criteria: Verify QStash signature (or document explicit CRON_SECRET-only policy) for scheduled-actions and watch renewal routes.
notes: Fixed: added QStash signature verification wrapper and CRON_SECRET check on scheduled-actions and Google watch renew routes.

title: AI analyze tool: calendar analysis types missing
description: src/server/features/ai/tools/analyze.ts only implements briefing; returns 'Calendar analysis type not implemented' for find_conflicts/suggest_times.
acceptance_criteria: Implement calendar analysis types or adjust tool schema to supported types.
notes: Fixed: analyze tool now supports calendar find_conflicts and suggest_times.

title: Sender categorization assumes categories exist
description: src/server/features/categorize/senders/categorize.ts TODO: handle missing categories; currently throws if none found.
acceptance_criteria: Add fallback or setup flow when categories missing.

title: Provider-specific profile data logic lives in auth
description: src/server/auth/index.ts and src/server/lib/auth.ts TODO: move provider-specific profile fetch into email provider.
acceptance_criteria: Move provider-specific logic into provider layer; update call sites.

title: Draft UI link hardcoded to Gmail
description: src/server/features/ai/tools/create.ts builds a Gmail-only draft URL and shows "Edit in Gmail" even for non-Google accounts.
acceptance_criteria: Generate provider-specific draft links or suppress the edit link when not supported.
notes: Fixed: draft edit action now only shown for Google accounts.

title: Missing Microsoft Drive webhook API routes
description: app/api has Google Drive watch/webhook routes but no Microsoft Drive equivalents (no src/app/api/microsoft/drive/*).
acceptance_criteria: Add Microsoft Drive webhook/watch endpoints with auth/signature validation.

title: Rules tool marked SAFE despite mutations
description: src/server/features/ai/tools/rules.ts sets securityLevel: "SAFE" while the tool creates/updates rules and knowledge; this bypasses CAUTION-gated mutation semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Set appropriate security level (e.g., CAUTION) or enforce mutation-specific approval checks.
notes: Fixed: rules tool securityLevel set to CAUTION.

title: Middleware error logging missing emailAccountId
description: src/server/lib/middleware.ts TODO: add emailAccountId to logErrorToPosthog call.
acceptance_criteria: Include emailAccountId in error logging context.

title: Outlook permissions bypass in checkPermissionsAction
description: src/server/actions/permissions.ts returns hasAllPermissions=true for non-Google providers (TODO: add Outlook handling), so Outlook permissions are never validated.
acceptance_criteria: Implement Outlook permission verification or block non-Google; add tests for Outlook path.

title: Outlook provider history processing is stubbed
description: src/server/features/email/providers/microsoft.ts defines processHistoryForUser as a no-op but still calls it in processHistory, so Outlook webhook processing is effectively disabled.
acceptance_criteria: Implement Outlook history processing or remove the call; ensure webhook events update state.

title: Rules match-rules TODO for consistency
description: src/server/features/rules/ai/match-rules.ts TODO: move filterConversationStatusRules into loop for consistency.
acceptance_criteria: Refactor loop or remove TODO.

title: API key auth supports only first account
description: src/server/lib/api-auth.ts selects user.accounts[0] with TODO for multi-account support.
acceptance_criteria: Select correct account for API key use or allow account selection; add tests.

title: Microsoft Drive large file upload (>4MB) not implemented
description: src/server/features/drive/providers/microsoft.ts throws for content >4MB; TODO: implement resumable upload.
acceptance_criteria: Add upload session flow for large files and tests.

title: Missing tests for approvals/triage/schedule-proposals/send/webhooks
description: No tests found under src/__tests__ for approvals, triage, schedule-proposal/ambiguous-time resolution, send tool, or webhook routes (rg search only found email-provider mock).
acceptance_criteria: Add unit/integration tests for approvals, triage, schedule proposal resolution, send tool, and webhook auth.
notes: Added tests: approvals action token, send tool, cron auth, calendar analyze.

title: User assessment missing auto-forwarding and snippet checks
description: src/server/lib/assess.ts TODOs for auto-forwarding rules and snippet usage detection via embeddings.
acceptance_criteria: Implement auto-forwarding check and snippet usage detection (or remove TODOs).

title: Report action duplicates Gmail label fetch
description: src/server/actions/report.ts TODO: refactor fetchGmailLabels into shared provider/service.
acceptance_criteria: Move Gmail label fetch to shared provider/service.

title: Microsoft Drive sync/watch not implemented
description: Drive sync exists only for Google (src/server/features/drive/sync/google.ts). No Microsoft Drive sync/watch layer or webhook processing found.
acceptance_criteria: Implement Microsoft Drive sync/watch support and processing layer.
